Charlie’s Angels (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,801,306Details
International Box Office $55,433,742
Worldwide Box Office $73,235,048
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,231,304
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,501,229
Total $2,732,533
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The Angels are working for the mysterious Charles Townsend, whose security and investigative agency has expanded internationally. With the world’s smartest, bravest, and most highly trained women all over the globe, there are now teams of Angels guided by multiple Bosleys taking on the toughest jobs everywhere.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,351,109 (46.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.13 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:24.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$48,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,452 opening theaters/3,452 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $23,242,633

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 15th, 2019 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: November 13th, 2019 (Wide) (Trinidad)
November 13th, 2019 (Wide) (Philippines)
November 13th, 2019 (Wide) (Jamaica)
November 13th, 2019 (Wide) (Indonesia)
November 14th, 2019 (Wide) (Syria)
Video Release: February 18th, 2020 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
April 6th, 2020 by Sony Pictures
MPA Rating: PG-13 for action/violence, language and some suggestive material.
(Rating bulletin 2596 (Cert #51938), 9/18/2019)
Running Time: 119 minutes
Franchise: Charlie's Angels
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel, Reboot, Scene in End Credits
Plot point: Corporate Malfeasance, Kidnap, Special Ops, Whistleblowers
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 2.0 Entertainment, Brownstone, Cantillon Company, Columbia Pictures, Perfect World Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
